title: psephellus persicus
intro: Psephellus persicus, also known as Persian dandelion, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psephellus persicus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Psephellus persicus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
